---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature for MaestroAgent
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem. E.g. "I'm frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional context

Screenshots, links, references, etc.

## Scope check

- [ ] This fits the v0.1 / v0.2 / v1.0 scope (see `docs/ROADMAP.md`)
- [ ] This is browser-first (works in the PWA, not just desktop)
- [ ] This doesn't require vendor lock-in or a paid service
